title: Genshin Impact Raiden Shogun GUI
description: Raiden Shogun-themed Minecraft UI pack with elegant visuals inspired by Genshin Impact.
body:
⚡ **Raiden Shogun** GUI Pack ⚡

Transform your Minecraft experience with a complete GUI overhaul inspired by Raiden Shogun from Genshin Impact!
Every interface has been redesigned with powerful purple tones, lightning-themed accents, and sleek electro-inspired details to reflect Raiden’s calm yet unstoppable presence.

✨ Features:

**Fully** reworked inventory
Crafting table & furnace screens
Villager trading interface
Chests, menus, and more!

💜 Perfect for Genshin Impact fans who want their Minecraft to feel powerful, stylish, and charged with Electro energy!

Genshin Impact and its characters are property of HoYoverse.
This is an unofficial fan-made resource pack.
